productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Sweatshirt
description: Composition Blue hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with rubbed cuffs, full zippered placket, crystal embellishments forming the label's logo on The left chest and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryCrystal studded sweatshirt for women from united colors of benetton. This classic design is a layering junkie's fashion essential. Wear it over naughty statement t-shirts and colourful canvas shoes. You can also wear this to your training sessions with trackpants and a yoga t-shirt, coupled with sports shoes.Model statistics  The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
